full_text: After someone blew a hole in FAC deep under LOC in DATE, the global media debated a geopolitical whodunnit. The NORP media, bolstered by official statements from unnamed officials, suggested GPE was behind the attack. GPE and LOC condemn sabotage as suspicion mounts that GPE was behind pipeline leaks, read a representative ORG headline . GPE, meanwhile, blamed the ORG and soon found support from the legendary NORP journalist PERSON, who published a detailed, singlesource Substack post claiming that ORG placed CARDINAL charges to be set off later by ORG. CARDINAL thing everyone seemed to agree on Given the complexity of the attacks and how difficult it is to carry out such an act of sabotage, then its most likely that a state actor is involved, said CARDINAL expert whose quote ricocheted around social media. He added that the evidence pointed CARDINAL way Obviously GPE. The actual attackers were overjoyed by the proliferation of fake news, reveals ORG chief NORP political correspondent, PERSON, in his cinematic new book, ORG . The fingers pointed at GPE and GPE meant the NORP were less likely to send assassins after us, the hulking former general in the NORP intelligence service who oversaw the operation with MONEY in private funding told PERSON. This is, if youre looking for a Fathers Day gift, a classic dad book. The episode is a revealing moment in a story that PERSON broke large parts of in the ORG in DATE, and a useful glimpse at GPEs and the worlds disorienting fog of war in a broken information environment. At the time, ORG spokesman PERSON got it right The idea that GPE had blown up its own pipeline, and its leverage over LOC, was predictably stupid. The story turns out to have been crazier than anyone could have guessed. For all the early speculation that only a hightech military could have pulled it off, PERSON reveals that the NORP recruited a team of thrillseeking amateur divers who had trained to go far deeper than military professionals would risk. Their leader, whom he calls PERSON, had been a party girl and nude model the NORP tabloid PERSON, naturally, dug up the cover with her in a captains coat and nothing else. In PERSONs telling, she was the ORDINAL into the freezing, choppy NORP waters. The NORP media look here like fools, as does the conspiratorial mirror image imagining a vast secret GPE operation. The ORG and other Western intelligence agencies knew about the NORP plot and actively or passively misled the press and the public. The GPE agency appears to have misled its own allies too, describing the operation as rogue in a memo to its NORP counterparts. NORP officials would try hard to pin down the origin of the added adjective, PERSON writes. But the NORP and NORP have similar problems understanding GPE, and could be similarly misled. PERSON describes their intelligence leaders as chess masters who studied in the same academy, skilled at predicting CARDINAL anothers moves and hilariously attempting to apply that logic to allies and rivals who prefer PERSON. At CARDINAL point, PERSON writes, he and a senior GPE discussed a recent PERSON press conference. The GPE drew a schematic chart Hes conditioning the populace for the effects of his policy. Actually, I said, I think PERSON is just riffing about what he saw on TV TIME, PERSON writes. His interlocutor was confused. The truth in this case as is often true is specific, chaotic, at times just dumb. How did GPE, like GPE, allow the government to lead it into fantasy? Its a question that hovers over the recent GPE conflict too, of course. Part of the answer is the fog of war. Part is GPEs wishful thinking. And part is the media itself, increasingly shaped by corporate interests, political campaigns, intelligence agencies, and anyone else who has the time and money simply because its grown so easy. How did a former erotic model from Kyiv find herself on a daring mission to blow up GPEs MONEY ORG gas pipelines? The waves were QUANTITY high, tossing the sailing boat around like a walnut shell. LOC turned the colour of ink around it. Below deck on the Bavaria C50 yacht, just CARDINALm QUANTITY long with CARDINAL small cabins, a NORP diving crew waited nervously. The skipper had seen much worse and before the war he had sometimes enjoyed taking his clients into mild storms. But now he was concerned. This isnt diving weather. Are you sure? he yelled. They were not. CARDINAL by CARDINAL the divers voted to abort their mission and return to port. Then the lone woman among them, in her thirties, stood up. Ill call her PERSON. She had to shout over the wind. Let me go alone, Ill finish quickly, she said. The men shifted uncomfortably. Her diving buddy raised his hand. He didnt want to go but he was not going to let her risk it without him. They climbed on deck and got ready with extra care, the floor shifting beneath their feet. The waves sprayed water into the cabin. Each diver carried well over QUANTITY of gear for PERSON, that was more than her own body weight. Underwater the load would disappear as if lifted by a magic hand, but above the surface it was a struggle to take a single step. PERSONs buddy went into the water ORDINAL and rigged the bomb, a makeshift device fashioned from a divers breathing tank, weighing QUANTITY. This will be fun, PERSON called to him. PERSON whose name, like those of her fellow saboteurs, has been withheld for security reasons was born in PERSON in DATE and raised mainly by her mother. She was a restless, energetic child. By the time she finished high school she spoke some LANGUAGE and NORP, and she chose a university course that would allow her to travel. Kyiv in DATE was a wild place, awash with new money generated by the robberbaron capitalism that sprung from the wreckage of NORP communism. It fuelled a new type of nightlife and PERSON charged headlong into it. Young, strikingly beautiful and wearing glittering dresses, she was a fixture of the capitals nightclub scene. She occasionally worked as a model and once adorned the cover of an erotic magazine. Around that time, when she was barely 20, she went diving for the ORDINAL time off LOC coast. It was love at ORDINAL splash. Soon after she quit her day job and became a diving instructor. This financed trips to diving destinations GPE, GPE, GPE, GPE. She made friends the world over. Friends of hers to whom I have spoken say she was an embodiment of zhyttyeradisna, a NORP word meaning filled with love for life. She was also competitive. DATE after her ORDINAL descent with scuba equipment, PERSON became a technical diver someone who goes far beyond the limits of recreational diving. Soon she was dropping to depths of CARDINALm into a realm that even most combat divers never reach. She learnt to navigate cave systems and treacherous shipwrecks, developing a profound love for oceans, and for the life that flourishes in these dark netherworlds. Diving became her life. This carefree existence was shattered when GPE invaded GPE in DATE. PERSON was shocked by the stream of horrific images from the front line. CARDINAL of her closest friends and diving partners from ORG could no longer return home and became an activist and fundraiser for GPEs troops. PERSON, too, made efforts to fundraise. After a shaky peace agreement in DATE, she tried her hand at divingrelated businesses and lived abroad for short periods. When GPEs fullscale invasion started on DATE, she was with other NORP on a diving tour halfway around the world. They could have remained safely abroad but instead scrambled to return home. Her ability to dive far beneath the ocean surface was no longer of use to anyone, so instead PERSON and a few friends set up a charity to help victims of the NORP aggression, buying food, medicine and blankets and personally delivering them to needy families near battlefields. topic_id: UK Bans Social Media for Children Under 16: Is It a Good Idea?
full_text: TIME, PERSON announced that all under16s would be banned from social media starting in DATE. Credit Getty TIME, PERSON announced new curbs on social media for children and teenagers, primarily including banning under16s from various platforms by DATE. Speaking from FAC, the Prime Minister declared that a full, outright ban was the right thing to do as it was making children unhappy. In the ORG statement was a list of socialmedia platforms banned, including PERSON, ORG, ORG, Instagram and X, but not primarily messaging apps like ORG and ORG. It was also suggested that the Government was considering further restrictions for under18s down the road, including curfews and breaks from internet scrolling. Will it work? Or will teenagers find ways around the restrictions either by using other websites or by finding workarounds for the age restrictions, as has been the case in GPE? Even if partially effective, the measures could have some funny downstream consequences, particularly if they cause a large influx of schoolboy trolls into GPE. The social media app and became a refuge for ultraprogressives following PERSON purchase of PERSON. It has since become notoriously dogmatic in its Leftwing outlook, and reportedly aggressive toward perceived ideological enemies. PERSON reportedly wont be included in the restrictions. Its difficult to establish how much of younger PERSON and PERSON lean to the Right, but regardless of politics, a generation marinated in NORP PERSON all lean anarchic, and a forum invasion by the massed trolling firepower of this cohort would likely have entertaining consequences. Though the larger question is whether PERSON even cares how effective the PERSON is at keeping children safe, or whether its just another step toward ending internet anonymity. This has long been a prize for those who view freedom of speech as an impediment to orderly governance. And, indeed, DATEs measures carry more than a whiff of careful planning to this end. The legislative foundation is already a fait accompli , thanks to changes passed into law in FAC and Schools Act , DATE. This Act created an open door for the ORG to ban harmful online features in the name of childrens safety, without further legislation. In response, most of the reporting on the ban for teenagers has focused on which sites might be restricted. Less attention has been paid to possible mechanisms for doing so, and its still unclear after the announcement. But unless you want kids to just lie about their age, enforcement would either have to be via parental authority unlikely given ORGs congenital nannystatism or some kind of digital gatekeeping. In the latter case, in order to work, the age or, in other words, identity verification process would have to encompass everyone, not just teenagers. In effect, then, this would tie social media usage to named individuals, using an official ID andor face scan, functionally ending online anonymity. What could possibly go wrong? Is this an acceptable price to pay for keeping children safe? Complaints about CARDINALtier criminal justice and institutional political bias are already rampant. Evidence from LAW strongly suggests that these measures would swiftly be weaponised along similar lines. The swift turnaround between the GPE unrest that followed the attempted beheading of PERSON and PERSON announcement of further restrictions on digital communications during times of crisis should leave no doubt in anyones mind of the robust link that now exists in ORG consciousness between unfettered digital conversation and public disorder. It feels less like ORG want to keep kids safe than to jam the lid down on a pressurecooker of discontent theyre incapable of addressing in substance. Having seemingly convinced themselves that ORGs unpopularity is caused not by peoples lived experience but entirely by PERSON and the online farRight, its not hard to see the appeal of being able to identify individuals blamed for whipping up discontent. Online child safety measures that would, as a byproduct, supply officials with faces and IDs for any individual online poster must be like catnip. And whether the real precipitating factors in public discontent can be persuaded to go away, simply by restricting peoples freedom to speak openly about them, is another matter. And its just as possible that those driven off the public internet will simply become less visible, less traceable, and more dedicated.
